title: Hidden Bossbars
description: This Minecraft Java Edition resource pack hides the bossbar from your HUD. It's a free and easy-to-install download that removes the visual bar but keeps the text, perfect for servers. No mods are required, and it works in both singleplayer an
body:
# 🛑 Bossbar Hider - Resource Pack
A lightweight Minecraft resource pack that completely hides the bossbar (e.g., Ender Dragon, Wither or custom) from your HUD — no mods required!

# ✅ Features
- Removes the bossbar from view but keeps the text
- Perfect for cinematic recordings, adventure maps, or servers
- Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
- No performance impact

# 📦 Installation
1. Download the .zip file
1. Place it in your resourcepacks folder
1. Enable it from the Minecraft settings menu
